mapper.select: SELECT D.DEPT_ID ,D.DEPT_NAME ,D.PARENT_DEPT_ID ,D.COMPANY_ID ,D.SORT_ORDER ,D.FLAG_USE ,PD.DEPT_NAME AS PARENT_DEPT_NAME FROM DEPT_INFO D LEFT JOIN DEPT_INFO PD ON D.PARENT_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID WHERE D.FLAG_USE = 'Y' AND D.COMPANY_ID = #{companyId} ORDER BY D.SORT_ORDER ASC, D.DEPT_ID ASC

SELECT D.DEPT_ID AS id ,D.DEPT_NAME AS text ,IFNULL(D.PARENT_DEPT_ID, '#') AS parent ,D.COMPANY_ID AS companyId ,D.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder ,D.FLAG_USE AS flagUse FROM dept_info D WHERE D.COMPANY_ID = #{companyId} AND D.FLAG_USE = 'Y' ORDER BY D.PARENT_DEPT_ID ASC, D.SORT_ORDER ASC

SELECT D.DEPT_ID AS deptId ,D.COMPANY_ID AS companyId ,D.DEPT_NAME AS deptName ,D.PARENT_DEPT_ID AS parentDeptId ,D.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder ,D.FLAG_USE AS flagUse ,D.REG_DT AS regDt ,PD.DEPT_NAME AS parentDeptName FROM dept_info D LEFT JOIN dept_info PD ON D.PARENT_DEPT_ID = PD.DEPT_ID WHERE D.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND D.COMPANY_ID = #{companyId}
